step1.title: Name your company
step1.description: This is the organization your agents will work for.
step1.goalPlaceholder: What is this company trying to achieve?

step2.title: Create your first agent
step2.description: Choose how this agent will run tasks.

environmentCheck.title: Adapter environment check
environmentCheck.description: Runs a live probe that asks the adapter CLI to respond with hello.

step2.anthropicKeyWarning: Claude failed while {{key}} is set. You can clear it in this CEO adapter config and retry the probe.

manualDebug.title: Manual debug
manualDebug.authHint: If auth fails, set {{env}} in env or run {{cmd}}.
manualDebug.loginHint: If login is required, run {{cmd}} and retry.

step3.title: Give it something to do
step3.description: Give your agent a small task to start with — a bug fix, a research question, writing a script.
step3.defaultTaskTitle: Hire your first engineer and create a hiring plan
step3.defaultTaskDescription:
You are the CEO. You set the direction for the company.

- hire a founding engineer
- write a hiring plan
- break the roadmap into concrete tasks and start delegating work
step3.descriptionPlaceholder: Add more detail about what the agent should do...

step4.title: Ready to launch
step4.description: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the issue.

errors.testEnvironmentNoCompany: Create or select a company before testing adapter environment.
errors.opencodeModelRequired: OpenCode requires an explicit model in provider/model format.
errors.anthropicRetryFailed: Retried with {{key}} unset in adapter config, but the environment test is still failing.
